raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahs Pohgas us teem
Diwi Stabbeem bija Puƙƙu Dar-
bā darritas Preekſch-Nammā/
tschetras Ohlektis (Augstumā).
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahs Pohgas bija us
teem diwi Stabbeem / ir aug-
scham pahr to Wehdern bija di-
wifimts Granata - Ahboṭu ap-
fahrt/ fahnis to Tihkla Darbu
eekſch Rindahm: Ta patt arri
pee tahs ohtras Pohgas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to uszehle wiꞥſch
tohs Stabbusta Deewa Nam-
ma Pagalmā/ un to Stabbu/ ko
wiꞥſch pa labbo Rohku bij us-
zehlis/ noẜauze wiꞥſch Jakin/ un
to Stabbu/ ko wiꞥſch pa kreifo
Rohku bij uszehlis / noẜauze
wiꞥſch Boas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un augſchain us teem
Stabbeem bija tas Puƙƙu
Darbs. Ta tappe to Stabbu
Darbs pabeigts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch lehje arridsan
weenu Warra Juhrū/ deſmits
Ohleſschu bija no winnas wee-
nas Mallas lihdschtrai Mallai/
wissapfahrt appatu / un peezas
Ohlektis bija winna Augstums/
un tas Mehre wissapfahrt bija
trihsdeſmits Ohlektis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un appakſcha pee winnas
Mallas bija Pohgas wissap-
fahrt / deſmits padarrija weenu
Ohlekti/ un gahje apkahrt to Juhr-
u/ diwi Rindas no tahdahm
Pohgahm bija leetā Darbā
leetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta stahweja us di
padeſmits Wehrscheem/ not
greesahs trihs prett Seemi
puſſi / un trihs greesahs p
Wakkarapuſſi / un trihs p
Deenas - Widduspufsi/ un t
prett Rihtapuſſi / un ta Ju
bija wirsu us teem/ un wiﬀi w
zu pakkatas Galli bija Eck
puﬀê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winnas Refinuns
ja Plaukſtas Plattuma/ un u
nas Malla bija ka lahda Bi-
ra Malla/ ar Puƙƙehm ista
ta/ diwi tuhkſtoschi Batti fag
je eekſch tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch darrija arrid
deſmits Warra Skrahju
tschetr Ohlektis bija weenaSk-
ga Garrums / un tschetras
lektis winna Plattums/ un t
Ohlektis winna Augstums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teem Skrahgeem
tahds Darbs/ teem bija Sa-
Gardi starp Lihkſtehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un us teem Sahnus
deem/ starp tahm Lihkſtehm
ja Lauwas/ Wehrschi un Re-
bim/ un us tahm Lihkſtehm
weens Dibbens augſchain/un
pakſch teem Lauwahm un W-
scheem bija wehl zits Glihtu-
no isſteepta Darba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ikkatram Skrah-
bija tschetri Warra Ritten-
warra Affim. Un winnu tfo-
reen Stuhreem bija Turran-
appakſch ta Katla bijafchee W-
ra Turramee / tam Glihtun-
pretti.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
